result.finding: Spring Boot 3.3.2 application with embedded Apache Tomcat (Servlet 6.0 / Jakarta EE 10). The application uses Spring MVC over the embedded Tomcat servlet container provided by spring-boot-starter-web. No external deployment descriptor (web.xml), no container-specific configurations, and no custom Servlet/Filter implementations exist.
evidence: Spring Boot 3.x uses Jakarta EE 10 APIs (jakarta.servlet-api 6.0)
No container-specific configs (weblogic.xml, jboss-web.xml, etc.) found
No custom HttpServlet, @WebServlet, or @WebFilter implementations found
Spring MVC controllers use @Controller/@GetMapping annotations (annotation-based dispatch)
pom.xml packaging defaults to JAR (embedded Tomcat, not WAR for external deployment)
PetClinicRuntimeHints.java registers AOT runtime hints for Spring 6 native support
